name: Cable One Arm Front Raise
shortDescription: An isolation exercise that raises the arm forward using a cable to target the front deltoid.
instructions: Stand facing away from a low cable, grasping the handle with one hand. Keeping your arm straight, raise it in front of you up to shoulder height, pause, then lower under control.
steps: Attach handle to low pulley and stand facing away from machine.
Grasp handle with one hand, arm by your side.
With a straight arm, raise it forward to shoulder height.
Lower back to the start slowly and repeat.
breathing: Exhale as you lift, inhale as you lower.
